name: effect-scrapling
description: EffectTS + Bun scraping SDK, API, and CLI

scripts.format: bunx --bun oxfmt $(rg --files src tests apps libs tools scripts -g '*.ts')
scripts.format:check: bunx --bun oxfmt --check $(rg --files src tests apps libs tools scripts -g '*.ts')
scripts.ultracite: bunx --bun ultracite check $(rg --files src tests apps libs tools scripts -g '*.ts')
scripts.oxlint: bunx --bun oxlint $(rg --files src tests apps libs tools scripts -g '*.ts')
scripts.lint: bun run ultracite && bun run oxlint && bun run lint:typesafety
scripts.lint:fix: bunx --bun oxlint $(rg --files src tests apps libs tools scripts -g '*.ts') --fix && bun run format
scripts.build: bun run build:sfe:standalone && bun run build:sfe:api
scripts.check: bun run ultracite && bun run oxlint && bun run oxfmt && bun run lint:typesafety && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.check:release: bun run check:semver && bun run check:publint
